name: Beijing Sanfo Outdoor Products Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Sanfo Outdoor Products Co., Ltd provides outdoor life products and services in China. It is also involved in the events and camps training activities. The company sells its products through 38 stores in Beijing, Shanghai, Guandong, Jiangsu, Tianjin, Wuxi, Suzhou, Hangzhou, Chongqing, Wuhan, Chengdu, Hebei, Qingdao, Shenyang, and Changchun, as well as online stores. Beijing Sanfo Outdoor Products Co., Ltd was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.
